sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41173" key="e)pisfagi/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπισφᾰγίς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ίδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">σφαγή</etym>) <sense id="n41173.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">nape of the neck</tr_> where the axe strikes the bull, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:134" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.134</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
